message:
fix(search): remove incorrect #[cfg(feature = "hybrid")] on budget governor config

hybrid_budget_governor_config_from_env() was gated with
#[cfg(feature = "hybrid")] but called from derive_hybrid_execution_plan()
which is NOT feature-gated. This broke the portable release build
(--no-default-features --features portable) with E0425.

Found during post-commit code review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
